pr.title: Record: 5-gram Eval Cache + LeakyReLU² + Parallel Muon val_bpb: 1.0920 (3-seed mean, std 0.0007) | ~15.9 MB | 8×H100 SXM

output.summary: Adds confidence-gated online 5-gram cache mixing during sliding-window eval on LeakyReLU/Parallel Muon to capture repeats without extra GPU cost.
techniques: Confidence-gated online 5-gram cache with log-sum-exp mixing
Safety gate ensures n-gram mixing never worsens predictions
Zero-GPU CPU dict lookups accumulate backward-looking statistics
